name: OFFCUTS №01 — Night Bloom
based_on: An indie risograph art-and-writing zine in the spirit of small-press perzines and riso studios (e.g. the kind made on a Risograph and sold at zine fairs) — reimagined as a scrollable, art-directed web issue where 'each issue is a version'.
summary: A scrollable, art-directed web zine issue with riso/CRT texture, custom display type, asymmetric magazine spreads (cover, editor's letter, photo essay, poem, interview, field notes, colophon), and an 'issue-as-version' framing. Single self-contained index.html, no build.
sections: Cover spread with huge display type, issue number, and a scroll cue
Editor's letter with drop-cap and a riso-duotone desk photo
Photo essay in an asymmetric image mosaic ('After Hours')
Interview with Q&A layout and a pull-quote ('The Neon Doctor')
Field-notes card collage ('Specimens of the Dark')
Colophon with issue-as-version note and a validating newsletter signup
setup_questions: What's the theme/mood of the issue, and a title for it?
What are the 4-6 spreads of content (editor's letter, photo essay, poem, interview, field notes)?
Any real contributors, quotes, or images to feature — or should I invent believable ones?
photo_terms: neon sign workshop glowing glass tubes
rain slicked empty city street at night
